overall.description: A nighttime train journey through a virtual city and surrounding countryside, captured from the driver's perspective in a game engine. The train travels from an urban station area across an elevated bridge and through rural industrial zones, passing illuminated billboards and signal lights.

events.description: passing green railway signal light on the left side of the tracks

agents.ego_description: operating the train departing from the station area, accelerating along the tracks through semi-urban environment with platform lights visible

entered.detail: concrete platform with edge lighting running parallel to the tracks
dual metal railway tracks on gravel bed extending into the distance
tall metal lattice tower with multiple power lines crossing the scene

segments.scene_description: The train departs from a station area at night, with a concrete platform visible on the left. The tracks stretch ahead through a semi-urban environment with scattered trees and distant building lights. A green signal light is passed on the left as the train gains speed.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated railway bridge with concrete barriers

events.description: train enters elevated bridge section with high concrete barriers on both sides
train exits bridge structure returning to ground level

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed while crossing the elevated bridge section with city lights visible in the distance

entered.detail: solid concrete safety barrier wall running along the left side of the bridge deck
solid concrete safety barrier wall on the right side of the bridge
metal safety railing mounted on top of the right concrete barrier

segments.scene_description: The train travels across an elevated bridge with high concrete barriers creating a corridor-like effect. Metal railings line the edges as the city lights glow in the distance. The vegetation and station platform disappear behind as the bridge structure dominates the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural railway corridor with industrial billboards and guard rails

events.description: passing second green railway signal light on the left
large illuminated red billboard becomes visible ahead on the left side
train passes the illuminated billboard which recedes behind on the left

agents.ego_description: traveling through darker rural and industrial areas, passing signal lights and prominent illuminated advertisements along the trackside

entered.detail: white metal guard rail running parallel to the left side of the tracks
white metal guard rail on the right side of the railway
large brightly lit red advertisement billboard with 'Los Santos' text visible, standing prominently beside the tracks
dense dark trees and vegetation lining the left side of the corridor
trees and bushes on the right side creating a corridor effect

segments.scene_description: Returning to ground level, the train travels through a darker rural corridor with white guard rails and dense vegetation on both sides. A prominent illuminated billboard appears on the left, glowing brightly against the night sky before being passed. The scene is characterized by isolated industrial lighting and the rhythmic passage of signal lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward journey from a semi-urban station area into a dark, rural industrial corridor at night. It begins by departing a concrete platform, passing a green signal light as the tracks stretch toward distant building lights and scattered trees. As the train gains speed, the environment shifts into a confined corridor on an elevated bridge, where high concrete barriers and metal railings replace the open landscape while city lights glow in the distance. The scene then descends back to ground level, transitioning into a darker stretch of track flanked by white guard rails and dense vegetation. Finally, the camera passes a brightly illuminated billboard that glows against the night sky before moving deeper into the rural zone marked by isolated industrial lighting and rhythmic signal lights.
